omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We may share personal data with our advertising partners to show you ads that we think may interest you.
We may share personal data with our analytics partners to analyze traffic and usage trends for the Services and to create and review aggregated and anonymous reporting.

We may share personal data with our advertising partners to show you ads that we think may interest you.

Third Parties. We may share your information with third parties, including social media platforms and advertising partners, to allow them to market their products or services to you. This may include sharing your name, email address, user ID, and other identifiers. We may also share your information with third parties for other purposes, such as to provide you with targeted advertising or to improve our Services.

This may include sharing your name, email address, user ID, and other identifiers. We may also share your information with third parties for other purposes, such as to provide you with targeted advertising or to improve our Services.

We share your personal data with our affiliates, service providers, and other third parties (such as our business partners, and social media services, and in some cases, our advertisers and marketing partners) for the purposes described in this Privacy Notice, including for the purposes of providing, improving, and personalizing our Services, and for marketing and advertising purposes.
